hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // ""' | { read -r f; echo "$f" | grep -qE '/app/.+\.rb$' || exit 0; spec=$(echo "$f" | sed 's|/app/|/spec/|;s|\.rb$|_spec.rb|'); test -f "$spec" || exit 0; export HOME=/home/idarfan RBENV_ROOT=/home/idarfan/.rbenv; eval "$(/home/idarfan/.rbenv/bin/rbenv init -)"; cd /home/idarfan/fairprice && bundle exec rspec "$spec" --format progress 2>&1 | tail -8; }
